name: Frozen Mocha Toffee Dessert
recipeInstructions:
1. Line the bottom and 2 inches up sides of an 8-inch springform pan with split ladyfingers, cutting them to fit.
2. Dissolve the coffee powder in boiling water.
3. Blend together the coffee, ice cream, and crushed candy until combined.
4. Spoon the mixture into the prepared pan.
5. Cover and freeze until firm.
6. Just before serving, whip the cream with the coffee liqueur until stiff.
7. Spread the whipped cream over or pipe onto the frozen ice cream.
8. Garnish with additional pieces of broken toffee bars or with shaved chocolate, if desired.
